creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
amdmi3      2010-01-14 16:37:31 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    devel                Makefile 
  Added files:
    devel/p5-Test-Module-Used Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
                              pkg-plist 
  Log:
  Test dependency between module and META.yml.
  
  This module reads META.yml and get build_requires and requires.
  It compares required module is really used and used module is
  really required.
  
  WWW:    http://search.cpan.org/dist/Test-Module-Used/
  
  PR:             142818
  Submitted by:   Takuya Tsuchida <tsucchi@cpan.org>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.3779    +1 -0      ports/devel/Makefile
  1.1       +28 -0     ports/devel/p5-Test-Module-Used/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/devel/p5-Test-Module-Used/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +7 -0      ports/devel/p5-Test-Module-Used/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +5 -0      ports/devel/p5-Test-Module-Used/pkg-plist (new)
